title: Advocate Mohammed Shah PA appointed Additional Advocate General of Kerala
description: The Kerala government on Wednesday appointed advocate Mohammed Shah PA as Additional Advocate General (AAG) of the state.Shah was appointed after the government accepted the resignations of Additional Advocates General KP Jayachandran and Ashok M Cherian.The appointment comes days after the newly elected United Democratic Front (UDF) government assumed office in Kerala following the regime change in the state.Earlier this week Chief Minister VD Satheesan had announced the appointment of Senior A
